title: The 4-Hour Body
author: Tim Ferriss
subline: An uncommon guide to rapid fat-loss, incredible sex, and becoming superhuman.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A giant 4. The dot of the 4 is a stopwatch circle. The 4 sits large in the lower 2/3. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1600)" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" fill="#ffffff" text-anchor="middle">
    <text x="-160" y="380" font-size="1400" font-weight="300" letter-spacing="-0.06em">4</text>
    <!-- The vertical stem of the 4 is RED, the rest is white. Apply by overlaying a red rect. -->
    <rect x="-20" y="-300" width="40" height="700" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <!-- Stopwatch dot where the 4's diagonal meets its stem -->
    <circle cx="-20" cy="-300" r="42" fill="none" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3"/>
    <circle cx="-20" cy="-300" r="6" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <line x1="-20" y1="-360" x2="-20" y2="-400" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3"/>
    <text x="-20" y="500" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.4em">HOURS / WEEK</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A 1400px '4' in white at weight 300 dominates the lower 2/3. The vertical stem of the 4 is overlaid in red, with a small stopwatch (red circle + crown) at the join — the minimum effective dose made literal. The 4 IS the cover. Title 360px uppercase stacks above.
